entries.title: splunk-expert
entries.description: Expert-level Splunk Enterprise skills covering SPL, conf file management (props, transforms, server, indexes, inputs), SC4S, CIM compliance, TA/app development, ITSI, SOAR, distributed architecture, deployment server, dashboards, ingestion pipeline design, the Splunk UI Toolkit, log triage, Linux host tuning, HEC, Windows host, alert actions, REST API, authentication, KV Store, MLTK, and workload management.

entries.title: harmonia-ready-commands

entries.title: qtim

entries.title: token-economy
entries.description: Cut INPUT/orchestration tokens for multi-agent work, plus output discipline for the main thread. Mechanisms: discover-once context-pack (single repo scan, file:line map), terse read-only analysis lenses (no Edit/Write enforces read-only), a frugal output-style (result-first, no narration), a pluggable memory adapter (search-before/write-after, no races), and cap+cache. Complements caveman (output-style compression) — they stack.

entries.title: respira-wordpress-skills
entries.description: 35 specialised WordPress skills covering page-builder migrations (12 paths including Divi to Gutenberg, Elementor to Bricks, WPBakery to Gutenberg), site audits (technical debt, mobile experience, WooCommerce health), content workflows (internal linking, content portability, SEO/AEO), and onboarding. Auto-activates relevant skills as you describe what you want to do. Companion to Respira for WordPress Claude Co-work plugin.

entries.title: spanner-readonly-mcp
entries.description: Read-only Google Cloud Spanner MCP server. Exposes SELECT-only query execution and schema introspection (list_tables, describe_table, list_indexes, execute_query). Write operations are blocked by both a forbidden-keyword regex and a Spanner read-only snapshot.

entries.title: kerby
entries.description: kerby — the gate guardian for agentic coding. A loadable rule-corpus plus opt-in guardrail hooks that govern how an AI agent does coding work: clarity over cleverness, safety over speed, never leave the repo broken, and nothing unproven passes the gate. Load it into a session, reload after compaction, install per-project hooks, prepare an existing repo, or audit a repo's conformance to the rules.

Includes /devflow:implement (4-phase orchestrator), /devflow:review and /devflow:review-and-fix (a verification-checklist review engine that audits its own approval), the /devflow:docs suite, /devflow:create-issue, plus the self-improving retrospective loop (/devflow:retrospective per-PR + /devflow:retrospective-audit weekly).

entries.title: glyphdown
entries.description: Two-register prompting convention for Claude Code: dense ASCII form for internal reasoning, normal prose for user-visible output. Default deterministic codec + opt-in own-trained ML sidecar (no API key, no vendor). Ships a skill, UserPromptSubmit + PreCompact + PostToolUse hooks, lossless tool-result codec (ANSI strip + JSON minify + blank-collapse + trailing marker + data-shape guard + schema-tag prefix + break-even guard), and a 4-arm token benchmark. Fail-open on every path. Run bench/bench.py for measured numbers.

entries.description: Auto-generate presentations in Claude Code. The MCP server owns prompts, output schemas, and deterministic post-processing (validation, layout, lint, HTML/PPTX render); the client generates the slide content via a prepare/ingest handshake — no server-side LLM.

entries.title: google-ads-ppc-waste-finder
entries.description: Find wasted Google Ads spend fast: pulls the last 7 days of search terms via the Optmyzr MCP, flags high-spend zero-conversion queries, separates true waste from brand/competitor traffic, estimates monthly savings, and returns a ranked table plus a ready-to-paste negative keyword list. Powered by Optmyzr.

entries.title: sigma
entries.description: Personal AI workflow toolkit for data science & AI engineering. Research-first, spec-driven, loop-engineered pipeline (research → propose → blueprint → spec → tasks → implement-task → verify → loop), plus the Hermes conductor, a kanban board, and HTML artifact export.

entries.title: cais-harness
entries.description: Custom AI Studio agentic coding harness. Full client project lifecycle from intake to deployed POC/MVP via a connected 8-phase artifact pipeline.

entries.title: gravity-town
entries.description: Play Gravity Town — a fully on-chain AI-agent world on Gravity L1 (chain 127001). Create an agent, claim and harvest hex territory, build mines/arsenals, raid rivals, message and ally with other agents, write on-chain memories, and battle in the Arena autobattler. Includes a zero-clone MCP server (npx) so any MCP-capable agent can play.

entries.title: last30days
entries.description: Research any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Polymarket, GitHub, and 5+ more sources. AI agent scores by upvotes, likes, and real money - not editors.

entries.title: dsg-governance
entries.description: AI Governance Control Plane that makes every Agent decision provable, auditable, and replayable — Deterministic Safety Gate (Z3/SMT), Cryptographic Proof, Replayable Governance, Compliance Evidence Pack, and Hermes Controlled Executor. Built for VC, CTO, Enterprise Buyer, and Governance Team standards.

entries.title: code-craftsmanship
entries.description: Code quality and software design skills including Clean Code (Robert C. Martin), Refactoring patterns (Martin Fowler), A Philosophy of Software Design (John Ousterhout), The Pragmatic Programmer (Hunt & Thomas), Domain-Driven Design (Eric Evans), and Working Effectively with Legacy Code (Michael Feathers)

entries.title: ios-simulator-ui-flow
entries.description: Autonomous iOS Simulator UI verification flow verified against AXe v1.7.0: build, install, launch, inspect, tap, slider, swipe, drag, batch, screenshot, video, and verify.

entries.title: hotwire-codex-skills
entries.description: Unofficial skillset inspired by The Rails and Hotwire Codex (by Ayush Newatia), published with the author's permission. Skills and runnable checkers for Rails + Hotwire apps that ship to web/PWA, iOS, and Android. Unique vs other Rails plugins (which are LLM coders/reviewers): every skill ships a deterministic, CI-runnable linter that flags the failures that produce no error. Covers Hotwire Native bridge components and path config (cross-platform web+iOS+Android), Rails 7→8 upgrade with the LazyRouteSet route-test flake detector, Turbo 8 morphing, Turbo Frames with a dangling-target / duplicate-id linter, targeted Turbo Streams with a broadcast-eavesdropping linter, DB-backed token session auth with a security audit, and Turbo-safe Stimulus patterns.

entries.title: jstack
entries.description: jstack — a layered learn→plan→execute loop over 9 phases. Step 0 plans the task into a dependency-ordered checklist + a # LAYERS list; each layer walks all nine phases then advances to the next (frontend→…→deploy), only the last firing the ship promise. A semantic node-cache keys each node by a normalized token-set signature of its goal, so when a goal matches one settled on a prior walk the loop surfaces the prior result for reuse (skip) and fans out independent nodes in parallel. Mandatory podman containment: ship gates and witnesses run inside a memory-capped envelope (no host fallback). Contract-native: /contract substrate (aiko), default ship_gate, post-ship seal. In-place, multi-session, per-step grader, fib-harness adversarial pass on the verdict phase. Three harness adapters: Claude Code, Codex CLI, opencode.

entries.title: talos
entries.description: Orquestra pipelines de desenvolvimento de features no Talos (PRD, validação, entrevista, plano, execução, repair, review), auditoria universal e geração explícita de backlog mestre. Bundle único: 10 skills talos-* + orquestrador + 5 templates canônicos + validator subagente. Pipeline orientado a artefato com gates G1–G11.

entries.title: claude-skills
entries.description: 20-category solo-SaaS-founder platform — autonomous engineering OS, 18+ agents, 117 doctrine rules, 20+ slash commands, production forge script, LLM eval harness, MCP registry, DO agent scaffolding, RAG pipeline, multi-tenant subdomain provisioning, full-document processing (DOCX/XLSX/PDF/PPTX), and 32 AI-tool platform variants. One-line prompts to deployed Cloudflare Workers products.

entries.title: cnspec-skills
entries.description: cnspec agent skills for MQL development and policy navigation

entries.title: writing
entries.description: アイディアの発散から原稿の完成まで、執筆ワークフロー全体を支援するアウトライン駆動執筆プラグイン。

entries.title: formae-mcp
entries.description: MCP server and skills for formae infrastructure-as-code: manage cloud resources, handle drift, discover infrastructure, and build plugins

entries.title: debate
entries.description: Multi-model AI plan review: run any acpx-supported agent (Codex, Antigravity, Kimi, Qwen, etc.) in parallel, synthesize feedback, debate contradictions

entries.title: telegram-notify
entries.description: Telegram-bridged notifications and human-in-the-loop for Claude Code: approval gate (binary + picker) and work-completion notifier.

entries.title: phased-development
entries.description: Multi-tier orchestration system for long-running software projects: phase/sprint roles, testing protocol, Codex delegation, Sprint 0 trial pattern. Use when starting a new project expected to run 3+ phases.

entries.title: nlpm
entries.description: Natural-Language Programming Manager — score, check, fix, and test NL artifacts across Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Antigravity. Tier-aware scoring with per-tool overlays.

entries.title: agentops
entries.description: The operational layer for coding agents. Bookkeeping, validation, and flows that compound knowledge between sessions.

entries.title: w
entries.description: Universal slash commands `/w:*` (w = workflow) for the `@tacuchi/agent-workflow-cli` runtime. Stages + loops + artifacts model: SPEC (spec-new · spec-refine), PLAN (plan-new · plan-exec), QUICK (quick), workspace-init bootstrap, and the export-* family (the only artifact→docs/ promotion path). Commands start AI-run loops that manage sessions/artifacts under `.workflow/sessions/`; pluggable capability skills bind via `.workflow/skills.toml`. Install: `/plugin marketplace add ...` + `/plugin install w@<marketplace>`. peerDependency: `@tacuchi/agent-workflow-cli`.

entries.title: github-release
entries.description: Safe, automated GitHub releases with supply chain security. Prevents dangerous gh release commands, orchestrates version bumps, signed tags, and CI-driven releases across ecosystems (TYPO3, PHP, Node.js, Go, Python, Rust, skill repos).

entries.title: envoic
entries.description: Scan, audit, and safely clean Python virtual environments, node_modules, and development artifacts.

entries.title: claude-kit
entries.description: Multi-agent /workflow development pipeline (planner → plan-review → coder → code-review) with typed handoff contracts, lifecycle hooks, and MCP servers.

entries.title: flatppl
entries.description: Skills that teach AI agents to write FlatPPL models and answer questions about the language, grounding every construct in the public FlatPPL design spec.

entries.title: nature-skills
entries.description: A growing collection of Claude skills for producing academic work at Nature-journal standard. Covers scientific figures (nature-figure), manuscript prose polishing (nature-polishing), citation retrieval and export (nature-citation), data availability statements and FAIR metadata (nature-data), and paper-to-PPTX presentation conversion (nature-paper2ppt). Future releases planned: statistical reporting, peer-review responses, methods writing, cover letters, and review articles. All rules derived from primary sources — published Nature papers, journal author guidelines, and structured writing curricula.

entries.title: babysitter
entries.description: Orchestrate complex, multi-step workflows with event-sourced state management, hook-based extensibility, and human-in-the-loop approval

entries.title: sf-demo-scout
entries.description: Salesforce demo preparation pipeline — sparring, audit, deployment for SE demo orgs

entries.title: design-system
entries.description: World-class DS governance — skills + hooks + rules + CLAUDE.md instructions + 31 active M-rules + 89 audit dims. Source-of-truth for product workspaces consuming @qijenchen/design-system npm package.

entries.title: stageset
entries.description: Teach Claude to author and operate StageSet resources for the stageset-controller — ordered, gated, multi-stage Flux delivery.

entries.title: moonshot-relay-claude-profile
entries.description: moonshot-relay-claude-profile — a plugin for Claude Code

entries.title: worldos
entries.description: WorldOS — simulate living, AI-generated worlds and play epic D&D 5e inside them. An AI DM generates stories live within persistent, canon-anchored worlds; deterministic 5e rules, searchable memory, a voiced AI companion, fully voice-acted.

entries.title: stacked-prs
entries.description: Manage stacked branches and pull requests with git config metadata, Deno helper scripts, and the gh CLI.

entries.title: engineering-discipline
entries.description: Engineering discipline skills: optimization rules, systematic debugging, AI slop cleanup, and implementation guardrails

entries.title: skills-registry
entries.description: Site generation skills for the OpenDataHub Skills Registry

entries.title: monk
entries.description: Deploy and operate full applications with Monk DevOps Agent — cloud infra, SaaS integrations, and containerized workloads — from one chat. Bundles the monk skill and blocks accidental `monk` CLI shell-outs that would desync cluster state.

entries.title: research-engine
entries.description: Deep research engine for URLs (YouTube, arXiv, GitHub, blogs) or topic keywords. Produces structured markdown reports with full source attribution via parallel subagent fanout.

entries.title: mind
entries.description: Claude Mind - Give Claude photographic memory in ONE portable file. Share, version, and transfer your Claude's brain.

entries.title: dobby
entries.description: Architect-and-workers engineering kit: staged work sessions (scope → interview → research → spec → execute → wrap), worker agents (researcher, implementor, reviewer, verifier), and supporting skills.

entries.title: iowarp-contributing
entries.description: Uniform contributing guidelines for the IOWarp/Clio ecosystem — git etiquette, code style, project architecture, and workflow standards.

entries.title: vs-token-safer
entries.description: Sits between Claude Code and your codebase and hands back a short file:line list instead of dumping source into the chat. It uses a real language server when it can (clangd / Roslyn / tsserver / pyright), tree-sitter when there's no toolchain, and a fuzzy search built from your repo's own naming when you don't know the exact name (no embeddings). It section-edits Markdown and config files the same way. Everything stays on your machine. No IDE required. Bundles gamedev-log-analyzer for reading huge editor/build logs.

entries.title: port-daddy
entries.description: Authoritative port management and multi-agent coordination for local development. Atomic port assignment, pub/sub messaging, distributed locks, and agent registry via CLI, SDK, or HTTP API.

entries.title: kernel
entries.description: Claude Code learns from itself. KERNEL gives your agent persistent memory (AgentDB), multi-agent orchestration (15 agents, tiered routing), and a scientific experiment engine that proves which rules actually work. Your agent remembers failures across sessions, coordinates parallel work without merge conflicts, and evolves its own methodology through hypothesis testing. 20 skills, 14 commands, auto-adapting project profiles. The plugin stays general-purpose — project-specific session overlays live in the consuming repo's own hooks, not here.
